name: Lima Beans and Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the lima beans in a 3-quart pot and cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil and cook until tender.
3. While the beans are cooking, heat the bacon drippings in a skillet.
4. Add onion and smoked sausage; cook until lightly browned.
5. Drain beans, then return them to the pot.
6. Stir in sausage, onion, salt, and pepper.
7. Cook on medium heat for 10 minutes.
